title: UNDERWATER SOFT ROBOTIC SYSTEM
what: Full-stack architecture of an underwater robotic system
Soft actuator design, chassis development, and sensor/electronics integration
how: Soft actuator design and dynamic characterization
ROS2-based control software and sensor integration
Systematic testing protocols across operating and transitioning media
results: Novel characterization of actuator dynamics across fluid media
Ongoing: full system integration from mechanical to software stack
